title: Sonic 8 Bit
description: Blocks and Decorations From The 8 bit Sonic Games!
body:
Sonic 8 Bit adds various blocks from the Sonic Game Gear and Master System Games.

I intend to add more blocks from games like Sonic Triple Trouble and Sonic Chaos (Sonic Blast is a maybe). Only Creative for now since i thought this mod would be used for maps but survival will come at a later date. This is my first mod ever so srry if its a little low effort.

Upcoming Content:
- More Blocks And Decorations For Sonic 1 And 2
- Sonic Triple Trouble And Sonic Chaos Zones
- Biomes and Biome Music (If i can)

Note: It is recommended that some zones need SoniCraft e.g. Labyrinth Zone for completion but is not required for the most part.
